pattern: Hashing each value to the best chain length ending at it lets every element extend the chain that ended at value-minus-difference in a single pass.
hints: If a subsequence ends at the current value, its predecessor in value must be exactly this value minus the difference.
Keep a map from value to the longest valid subsequence ending at that value.
Scan left to right: dp[v] = dp[v - difference] + 1, and the answer is the largest dp value seen.

edge_inputs.description: the entire array is one chain
no two elements differ by the target so each stands alone
negative difference chain hidden out of order
zero difference counts repeats of the same value
later occurrence should not lengthen a broken chain

stress.description: random values over a narrow range with a small difference to grow long chains
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    arr = [rng.randrange(-30, 31) for _ in range(n)]
    difference = rng.randrange(-3, 4)
    return [arr, difference]
stress.note: narrow range and small difference create overlapping chains
